_comment: SCHEMA: rule (string, required), file (string, required), description (string, required), expiry (YYYY-MM-DD, required), reason (string, required)
_instructions: Add entries here to waive Salesforce Code Analyzer rule violations until the expiry date.
Once 'expiry' passes, the pipeline will FAIL again — fix the violation or renew the waiver.
Partial matches are used: 'rule' matches the Rule column and 'file' matches the File path.
Remove entries once violations are resolved.

description: Missing ApexDoc comment violation for CoverageDemoService.cls
reason: Temporary waiver - ApexDoc comments to be added by April 9
